Skill Path: Underworld

You blend in particularily well in poor and crime-ridden areas.

While developing your skills in Society you chose to focus specifically on Underworld, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X2jGFfLU5qI5XVot]{Streetwise}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.0WFL3FIbcVsdF3RZ]{Street Etiquette}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X2jGFfLU5qI5XVot]{Streetwise}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.0WFL3FIbcVsdF3RZ]{Street Etiquette}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LDUWw2TeEEH0KA6M]{Criminal Connections}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.gydOsP9VsdRw3Wg1]{Underground Network}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iCv8KTZ5PcF4GqeV]{Leverage Connections}; at 5th level: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ThoOsKjn5xCuZUqM]{Quick Contacts}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.IcpF4hZrSJAJdnJf]{Safehouse Network}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Zf4yiLDdxHPovEQI]{Legendary Codebreaker}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.n0S0tJiOJPQk0Rne]{Legendary Linguist}
